architecture_descriptions.fullstack: End-to-end system design covering both high-performance backends and modern frontend architectures for enterprise solutions.
architecture_descriptions.react: Comprehensive frontend architecture focusing on component modularity, state management efficiency, and atomic design principles.
architecture_descriptions.dotnet: Robust backend architecture utilizing Modular Monoliths, Clean Architecture, and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to ensure scalability.
architecture_descriptions.sql: High-integrity database modeling focusing on relational efficiency, normalization, and optimized query performance for complex data.

identity.title: Identity & Security
identity.description: User authentication, role-based access control, and tenant security.

billing.title: Billing & Finance
billing.description: Automated invoicing, tax processing, and financial reporting.

tenancy.title: Tenancy Management
tenancy.description: Multi-tenant isolation and subscription-based access control.

invoices.title: Invoices & Documents
invoices.description: Generate and manage digital invoices with automated processing.

hero.name: Ayman Ahmed
p: React.js, ASP.NET Core, and SQL Server

about.content: I'm a motivated Full Stack Developer with strong expertise in building modern web applications using React.js and robust backend systems with ASP.NET Core. I specialize in creating efficient, scalable, and user-friendly solutions with a focus on clean code and layered architecture. Let's work together to bring your complex business requirements to life!

architecture.content: I specialize in building complex Enterprise systems using Modular Monolith architectures. By decoupling systems into independent modules like Identity, Billing, and Invoices, I ensure that the software is scalable, maintainable, and strictly follows Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles.

works.content: The following projects demonstrate my ability to handle complex logic and architectural designs. From desktop license management to simulation systems, each project reflects my commitment to data integrity, performance, and user experience.

message.placeholder: What do you want to say?

freelance.title: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
points: Designed and implemented high-performance desktop and web applications using C# and React.js.
Developed complex administrative systems like DVLD using 3-Layer Architecture for better scalability.
Ensured data integrity and secure transactions in banking simulation projects.
Created modern, responsive user interfaces using Material UI and custom CSS.

diploma.title: Diploma in Computer Science
points: Focused on software engineering principles, OOP, and database management.
Participated in multiple academic projects involving SQL Server and .NET.
Graduated with a strong foundation in both desktop and web development.

saad.text: Ayman did a great job on our management system. His attention to detail and architectural knowledge is impressive.
saad.name: Saad Al-Amri

communication-hub.name: Enterprise Communication Hub
communication-hub.description: A highly extensible Real-time Communication Hub for enterprise systems. I engineered the core messaging engine, integrated dynamic tracking for appointments and messages, and designed a modular framework that allows seamless integration of Support, Inquiry, and Incident Reporting sections.

gcorp-ecommerce.name: G-Corp | E-commerce Portfolio
gcorp-ecommerce.description: A curated portfolio of 8 professional e-commerce stores built for clients across Saudi Arabia — covering fashion, perfumes, fabrics, handbags, flowers, and more. Full-service delivery: design, development, and deployment.

invoice-flow.name: InvoiceFlowPro
invoice-flow.description: A professional Modular Monolith system designed for invoice management, featuring advanced modules for Identity, Tenancy, Billing, and Automated Processing. Built with DDD principles and clean architecture.

dvld.name: DVLD System
dvld.description: A comprehensive 3-layer management system for vehicle license services, handling issuance, renewal, and suspension with fine-grained role-based access control.

banking.name: Banking Simulation
banking.description: A secure banking system simulation that replicates core banking operations, account management, and fund transfers using OOP principles and layered architecture.

apartment-rental.name: Apartment Rental
apartment-rental.description: An automated management system for apartments and tenants, managing contracts, payments, and billing cycles with automated business rules.

3d-portfolio.name: 3D Personal Portfolio
3d-portfolio.description: A high-end interactive 3D web application designed to showcase professional expertise. Built with high-performance 3D models, dynamic stars background, and smooth Framer Motion animations.
